elixir_loong_per_round.note: Patch notes: with Elixir Loong ruler ability.

ability.name: Shield Sponsor
ability.description: Grants a random shield to the lowest-HP% ally at 5s and 15s; second shield has 3-tile break impact.

trait_threshold_changes.note: 6-troop tier is conditional (Ultimate Origins modifier), not unconditional baseline.

new_modifiers.name: Rage Shield
new_modifiers.effect: +50% hit and movement speed to tiled troop and surrounding allies for 8s after shield breaks

new_modifiers.name: Slowdown Shield
new_modifiers.effect: -35% hit and movement speed to surrounding enemies for 8s after shield breaks

new_modifiers.name: Star Shield
new_modifiers.effect: Tiled troop and surrounding allies level up after shield breaks

new_modifiers.name: Lava Shield
new_modifiers.effect: DOT to surrounding enemies for 8s at -10% max HP per second after shield breaks

new_modifiers.name: Trait Gift
new_modifiers.effect: Round End: each active trait grants +1 Elixir

missing_baseline_fields.notes: Official season post provides deltas, not full baseline. Fill from previous full season snapshot + in-game validation.
